name: Summer AutoMart
description_short: Family-owned used car dealership in Memphis, TN offering in-house Buy Here Pay Here financing since 1999 for customers with limited credit options.
description_long:
Summer Automart Inc. is a family-owned used car dealership established in 1999, located at 2919 Summer Avenue in Memphis, Tennessee. With over 25 years of operational history, the dealership has built its reputation within the Memphis community by focusing on affordable and dependable vehicle sales. The business model emphasizes fair pricing and honest customer relationships as core values.

The dealership specializes in used car, truck, and SUV sales with two primary purchasing options: in-house financing (Buy Here Pay Here model) and cash purchases. Their in-house financing option is particularly significant as it serves customers who may not qualify for traditional bank financing due to credit challenges. The company maintains an online virtual showroom with detailed vehicle information, photo galleries, and inventory browsing capabilities, complemented by in-person showroom visits and test drive opportunities.

What distinguishes Summer Automart is their explicit commitment to the Buy Here Pay Here financing model, which directly addresses consumers unable to access conventional auto loans. Their 25+ year operational tenure in the same Memphis location suggests business stability and community integration. The family ownership structure and stated focus on "treating customers right" positions them as an alternative to larger dealership chains, with emphasis on personalized service from their described "friendly and knowledgeable sales staff."

However, prospective customers should note that in-house financing typically carries higher interest rates and stricter payment terms than traditional bank auto loans, though this trade-off reflects their role in serving subprime borrowers. The website provides limited specific information about financing terms, rates, vehicle pricing structures, or payment schedules. No information is available regarding vehicle warranty coverage, service facilities, or post-purchase support beyond the financing relationship.
pros: Offers Buy Here Pay Here in-house financing for customers with poor or no credit history
25+ years of operational history in Memphis community since 1999
Family-owned business model with emphasis on honest transactions and fair pricing
Online virtual showroom with detailed vehicle photos and specifications
Local presence at single fixed location (2919 Summer Ave) with available test drives
Multiple contact options (phone, online forms, in-person visits)
Accepts both financed and cash purchases for customer flexibility
cons: In-house financing typically carries significantly higher interest rates than traditional auto loans
Website provides no transparency on specific APR rates, terms, or payment schedules
No information about vehicle warranties, service options, or post-purchase support
Limited inventory visibility without visiting dealership or requesting quote
No details on down payment requirements, payment frequency, or late payment policies
best_for: Consumers with poor credit or no credit history unable to qualify for traditional auto loans
Memphis-area residents seeking affordable used vehicles with flexible financing
Buyers prioritizing in-person relationships and local business support over large dealership chains
Individuals needing immediate vehicle access with payment plan financing options
diagnosis: Summer Automart is best for Memphis-area consumers with limited or damaged credit who cannot qualify for traditional auto financing and need immediate access to affordable used vehicles with flexible payment plans. The primary caveat is that in-house financing comes with substantially higher costs than conventional auto loans—borrowers should understand they are paying a premium for credit accessibility and should carefully review all terms before committing.
services: Buy Here Pay Here in-house financing
Online vehicle inventory browsing and virtual showroom
Price drop notifications and vehicle price watching
Phone and online customer inquiry support
